segments: : اقْرَءُوا سُورَهَ الْفَجْرِ فِی فَرَائِضِکُمْ وَ نَوَافِلِکُمْ فَإِنَّهَا سُورَهٌ لِلْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ ع مَنْ قَرَأَهَا کَانَ مَعَ الْحُسَیْنِ ع یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ فِی دَرَجَتِهِ مِنَ الْجَنَّهِ- إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزِیزٌ حَکِیمٌ
arabic.text: : اقْرَءُوا سُورَهَ الْفَجْرِ فِی فَرَائِضِکُمْ وَ نَوَافِلِکُمْ فَإِنَّهَا سُورَهٌ لِلْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ ع مَنْ قَرَأَهَا کَانَ مَعَ الْحُسَیْنِ ع یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ فِی دَرَجَتِهِ مِنَ الْجَنَّهِ- إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزِیزٌ حَکِیمٌ

segments: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sandal from Dawud b. Farqad from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Recite Surah Fajr in your obligatory and recommended prayers. This Surah is related to Imam Husain bin Ali (a.s.). Hence the reciter of this Surah will get a position near Imam Husain (a.s.) in Paradise on the Day of Judgment. Surely Allah is Honored and Wise.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sandal from Dawud b. Farqad from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Recite Surah Fajr in your obligatory and recommended prayers. This Surah is related to Imam Husain bin Ali (a.s.). Hence the reciter of this Surah will get a position near Imam Husain (a.s.) in Paradise on the Day of Judgment. Surely Allah is Honored and Wise.”

narratorChain.raw: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ صَنْدَلٍ عَنْ دَاوُدَ بْنِ فَرْقَدٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ
